title: pilosella subcymiflora subsp. hyperdoxoides
intro: Pilosella subcymiflora subsp. hyperdoxoides, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella subcymiflora, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella subcymiflora subsp. hyperdoxoides are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
